column1: # SOURCE: Panuganti S.R. et al. (2012) PC-SAFT characterization of crude oils and modeling of asphaltene phase behavior
# PC-SAFT correlations for saturates and aromatics+resins pseudo-components
# Reference: correlations from Gonzalez D.L. and Ting P.D. (Gonzalez 2007 Energy Fuels 21
# Aromatics+Resins: gamma-interpolated between gamma=0 (benzene derivative) and gamma=1 (PNA/poly-nuclear-aromatic)
# Formula: parameter = (1 - gamma) * benzene_derivative_form + gamma * PNA_form

column2: sigma in Angstrom (denoted A in paper)
